name: Australia Post International
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/thumb/APP-37.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/thumb/APP-37.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Shipping label and manifest features require the "}, {"text": "Neto Commerce Ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the Australia Post International add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Shipping section locate Australia Post International and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup Form"}]}, {"text": " and Neto staff will set up the shipping labels for you for free."}]}]}]}]
